conversation.text: hi yeah I submitted the form
Hey, yeah I saw that come through. Was this regarding Greenfield Properties?
Nice. So what was the main reason that made you want to try out demo today?
oh. Well i guess it caught my interest and felt pretty relivan
And what happens when those come in, you got a team picking them up or?
yeah during the day, but evenings and weekends nobody really gets back to them till monday
Yeah that's probably the biggest gap we see with agencies like yours. Those evening leads are already paid for through the ads, they're just sitting there going cold
Have you tried anything to fix that before or is this the first time you've looked into it?
Fair enough. Well before I send you a link to book a quick call, anything you're unsure about or want to know first?
nah im good, send it over

Louis is the founder, he handles all the strategy calls. He'll walk you through how it'd work for your setup specifically
https://calendly.com/markeye/free-discovery-call
Just grab whatever time works
